summary: All referenced files that should currently exist in the codebase have been confirmed (merchant routes, legacy onboarding files, lib utilities, dashboard components, prisma schema models). New files to be created are correctly marked as '(new)'. One internal inconsistency found: the Architecture 'New API Routes' list omits `src/app/api/templates/[id]/public/route.ts`, which is introduced in Task 3 and referenced in Task 8. This is a spec documentation gap but not a mirage. All packages referenced in Dependencies (zod, supabase-js, prisma, next-auth) are confirmed in package.json. No references to non-existent files, packages, or impossible API conventions detected.
